features.title: Core Features of the System
features.description: The Unified AI Framework brings modern agricultural intelligence directly to farmers—making farming smarter, faster, and more efficient.

cropRecommendation.title: Crop Recommendation Engine
cropRecommendation.description: Get AI-powered crop recommendations based on your soil and weather conditions

cropRecommendationInput.title: Crop Recommendation
cropRecommendationInput.description: Input your location to get tailored crop recommendations. Our system leverages your GPS coordinates for precise guidance.
cropRecommendationInput.permissionDenied: Permission denied to access location. Please enable location services for your browser.
cropRecommendationInput.locationUnavailable: Location information is unavailable. Please try again later.
cropRecommendationInput.timeoutError: The request to get user location timed out.
cropRecommendationInput.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while fetching location.
cropRecommendationInput.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.

cropRecommendationResult.title: Your Personalized Recommendation
cropRecommendationResult.description: The system has analyzed real-time environmental data and soil parameters to determine the most optimal crop for your location.
cropRecommendationResult.analysisNote: Analysis based on API-fetched soil and weather data.

cropRecCard.title: AI Crop Recommendation
cropRecCard.description: Get the best crop suggestions based on soil & weather.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Farm Matrix AI. All rights reserved.

history.heading: Recommendation History
history.description: Review all your past AI-generated crop suggestions.

screenshots.heading: System Snapshots
screenshots.description: A quick look at how the Unified AI Framework appears in real usage — from predictions to visual diagnostics.

systemArchitecture.heading: System Architecture
systemArchitecture.description: The architecture integrates multiple intelligent layers — providing a seamless flow from user input to AI-powered output.

frontend.title: Frontend (React JS)
frontend.description: The user interface allows farmers to input soil data, fetch location, upload leaf images, and visualize crop/disease predictions.

backend.title: Backend API Layer
backend.description: Flask/FastAPI or Node.js processes user requests, connects ML models, and handles data integration between frontend and models.

externalAPIs.title: External Data APIs
externalAPIs.description: Weather & Soil APIs (OpenWeatherMap, SoilGrids) provide real-time environmental data, enabling the virtual sensor functionality.

mlModels.title: Machine Learning Models
mlModels.description: Random Forest recommends the most suitable crop, while the CNN model performs disease classification from leaf images.

database.title: Database Layer
database.description: Stores user history, crop data, model files, and prediction analytics for ongoing system improvement and retraining.

aiModels.title: AI Models Behind the System
aiModels.description: Our system is powered by two intelligent machine learning models designed to enhance crop productivity and protect plants from diseases.

models.title: Random Forest Classifier
models.description: The Random Forest algorithm analyzes soil nutrients (N-P-K), pH, temperature, and rainfall data to recommend the best crop for the farmer’s exact location. It handles non-linear relationships exceptionally well, making it ideal for agricultural predictions.

models.title: CNN – Disease Detection Model
models.description: A Convolutional Neural Network trained on the PlantVillage dataset identifies plant diseases instantly from leaf images. It classifies diseases with high precision and provides quick diagnosis for timely crop protection.
highlight: Trained on thousands of leaf images

diseaseDetection.title: Disease Detection
diseaseDetection.description: Upload images of your crops to detect diseases early
diseaseDetection.resultPlaceholder: (AI prediction will show here after integration.)

diseaseDiagnosisOutput.title: Disease Diagnosis Output
diseaseDiagnosisOutput.description: The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) has processed the image to identify the specific pathogen affecting your crop.
symptoms: Small, scattered chlorotic (yellow) spots on young leaves.
Spots typically develop a gray/tan center with a dark purple border as they mature.
Affects leaf area, leading to premature defoliation and yield loss.
management: Apply broad-spectrum fungicides (Strobilurins/Triazoles) early in the season.
Use resistant soybean varieties for future planting.
Implement crop rotation with non-host crops.
Bury infected crop residue through tillage.

diseaseDetectionUpload.title: Disease Detection
diseaseDetectionUpload.description: Upload a clear image of the affected plant leaf to receive an immediate AI-powered diagnostic.
diseaseDetectionUpload.cameraAlert: Simulating Camera capture... (Requires access to user's camera)

errors.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please enable location services.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred while fetching location.
errors.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.

loading.analyzingDesc: Running Random Forest Model on real-time soil and weather parameters.

about.title: About Farm Matrix AI
about.description: Empowering farmers with artificial intelligence and smart technology

howItWorks.title: How the Unified AI System Works
howItWorks.description: From location input to final crop and disease insights, here's how our intelligent system guides farmers step-by-step.

step1.title: 1. Get Location
step1.description: The farmer allows GPS access, and the system automatically reads the exact location for site-specific prediction.

step2.title: 2. Fetch Soil & Weather Data
step2.description: The system pulls real-time temperature, humidity, rainfall, and soil nutrient data using APIs (Virtual Sensor).

step3.title: 3. Intelligent Data Fusion
step3.description: All environmental parameters are processed and combined to create a precise data vector for ML prediction.

step4.title: 4. AI Crop Recommendation
step4.description: The Random Forest model analyzes conditions and suggests the best crop tailored to your land.

step5.title: 5. Disease Detection
step5.description: The farmer uploads a leaf image. The CNN model identifies diseases instantly and suggests treatment.
